headline: AI adoption is accelerating faster than its security layer
summary: By the end of 2026, 40% of enterprise applications will be integrated with task-specific AI agents, up from less than 5% in 2025, according to Gartner. Most organizations have no idea what those agents are doing once they are deployed. That is not an alarmist claim: It is the data. And the gap ...

headline: Is Gartner (IT) Now Offering Value After A 64.6% One Year Share Price Slump?
summary: If you are wondering whether Gartner's current share price reflects its true worth, the recent performance gives plenty to think about before making any decisions. The stock closed at US$148.49, with returns of 0.1% decline over 7 days, 6.2% decline over 30 days, and a steeper 37.4% decline year to date, adding up to a 64.6% decline over 1 year and a 50.6% and 35.8% decline over 3 and 5 years respectively. Recent news around Gartner has focused on its role as a key research and advisory...
